evals.prompt: hey let's vibe plan — I want to build something that helps musicians find collaborators
evals.expected_output: A full conversational interview in surfer persona, followed by a structured Vibe Plan summary with: Big Idea, Core Users, Must-Have Features (3), Nice-to-Have Features, Tech Stack, Success Metrics, Open Questions. Ends with a Vercel deployment suggestion.

evals.prompt: vibe-plan my idea: a better way to track personal finances that doesn't feel like work
evals.expected_output: Surfer-voiced interview digging into who the users are, what makes existing finance apps feel like work, what 3 features would make this different. Summary with all required sections. Vercel nudge at end.

evals.prompt: can you interview me about my app? it's kinda like airbnb but for parking spots
evals.expected_output: Interview explores: who lists spots vs who books, how payments work, MVP scope vs full marketplace, what's been tried. Forces prioritization down to 3 core features. Delivers clean Vibe Plan doc. Ends with Vercel suggestion.
